programmes.d: Continuing his Journey down the East-coast of Tasmania Ben Milbourne visits the breath-taking Freycinet Marine Park and Lodge to enjoy some of the freshest Oysters and Mussels you can find.
Ben Milbourne discovers the hidden gem that is Maria Island, only accessible by plane or boat, the Island boasts historic ruins, sweeping bays and jaw dropping cliffs.

The Buffalo boys gather in Red Deer for Mikeys D-Day tribute jump. Joe and Sam scout out the designated military drop zone over Abraham Lake in the Rockies only to discover the canyon is too narrow for the DC-3. So Joe cancels the whole thing—its too dangerous. Mikey uses Joes own philosophy against him: at Buffalo, theres always a backup plan. Joe flies out to scout a new location for the drop on the lake but hits bad weather. As Joe is about to scrap the trip, twenty paratroopers from t...
Jack cooks his dads steak and kidney pudding recipe at home in Cornwall, before taking it to Singapore. He makes a deconstructed version of the traditional British dish.
Jack wants to share his favourite childhood breakfast dish with the locals of Tallinn, Estonia. He makes smoked kipper and poached eggs with an Estonian twist.
Coyote Peterson and the crew are back in Louisiana in search of the alligator snapping turtle!
Coyote Peterson shows us how to catch a River Dragon and spots an extremely poisonous Newt!
Chef Darren Robertson prepares an all-inclusive grilled feast on a traditional barbecue for himself and one of his closest friends.
Chef Darren Robertson shows how to safely and efficiently cook with fire in the smallest of outdoor spaces. Despite the obstacles in his way, Darren manages to create a grilled masterpiece.

On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duos bravery (or stupidity) doesnt end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin upside down as Voladores in a traditional rain ceremony, and get tattoos right before diving into th...

Rooftop and Catfishs travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheeps head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to thi...
Remote surf cast fishing delivers monster tarpon, cubera snapper, and massive bull sharks - all while wading waist-deep in shark-infested waters.
Gian Tiger Sharks attack massive schools of amberjack 40 miles off the coast of Florida. Fred fights his way up the food chain to bring a true monster Tiger Shark to the boat.

If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the Glades, the hunter has become the hunted as Dusty "Wildman" Crum has made it his mission to eradicate this species. ...

A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60s and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their popula...

programmes.t: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild S1 2018
programmes.d: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. Shes overcome lifes biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programmes.t: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild S1 2018
